topics.title: George Takei Joins the Stern Show
topics.summary: The studio welcomes George Takei as the new announcer for the show and discusses his transition to satellite radio, his public coming out, and a review of the program's content.

topics.title: Review of Previous Broadcasts and Media Coverage
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production details of a recent broadcast, including instances of profanity, media reactions to their content, and interactions with various radio personalities.

topics.title: Radio Show Logistics and Promotion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the transition of Bubba the Love Sponge to a new time slot, technical issues with engineer Scott's presence, and the promotion of Vermont Teddy Bears.

topics.title: Governor Schwarzenegger and George Takei Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation between Howard Stern, George Takei, and California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger regarding his motorcycle accident, the state's same-sex marriage bill, and various cultural topics.

topics.title: Howard Stern's Sirius Satellite Radio Debut
topics.summary: The studio reports on Howard Stern’s transition to satellite radio, featuring a call from the Governor of California and an interview with AJ Hammer regarding the new show's lack of restrictions.

topics.title: JD and Courtney's Relationship
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Courtney, who describes her relationship with JD and her past experiences in the adult industry.

topics.title: JD's Loss of Virginity
topics.summary: The studio records a detailed and humorous recount of Courtney's sexual encounter with JD, who is celebrated for losing his virginity.

topics.title: JD's First Sexual Experience
topics.summary: The studio records a detailed and graphic recount of JD’s first sexual encounter with Courtney, including specific details about their positions, the use of condoms, and their subsequent interactions.

topics.title: TomatoVine Promotion and Star Trek Discussion
topics.summary: The show features a promotion for TomatoVine.com phone services followed by a discussion regarding Star Trek conventions, celebrity interactions with Bill Shatner and Leonard Nimoy, and the production of the radio program.

topics.title: Arty & And
topics.summary: It was just like a fun thing for me to listen to. And I called in, and I know Ralph dropped by.

topics.title: Satellite Radio and Media Censorship
topics.summary: The studio discusses the opportunities provided by satellite radio technology for broadcasters facing corporate restrictions and potential government crackdowns on indecency during an election year.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The show features discussions on celebrity news including George Takei's career, Arnold Schwarzenegger's recent interview, and various Hollywood relationships.

topics.summary:

previous experiences or advocacy influence his decisions on the court.
